mapper.sql: message_id, receiver_id, title, type, is_read, create_time, del_flag
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_message(receiver_id, title, content, type, is_read, create_time, del_flag) values (#{receiverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isRead,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_message
receiver_id,
title,
content,
type,
is_read,
create_time,
del_flag,
#{receiverId,jdbcType=BIGINT},

mapper.update:
update biz_message
receiver_id = #{receiverId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_read = #{isRead,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
where message_id = #{messageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_message set receiver_id = #{receiverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_read = #{isRead,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where message_id = #{messageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_message set receiver_id = #{receiverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_read = #{isRead,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where message_id = #{messageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
